{{Infobox technique
| name = Phoenix Song
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Phoenix]] Song is a complex, ethereal melody that serves as both a sensory phenomenon and a source of power. When summoned, the music resonates through a person's bones and allows for much clearer auditory perception of her surroundings. The composition is intricate, blending elements of the [[Sword Icon]], the sharp silence associated with [[Eithan]]'s combat methods, and an inherent sense of bloodlust. This melody can influence a person's movements, driving them to dance to its rhythm while empowering their weapons with red-and-silver madra. As the song intensifies toward a crescendo, it becomes more insistent, acting as a constant reminder of nearby threats. The song is deeply connected to the [[Phoenix]], an entity that can manifest as a motherly woman with scarlet wings and a musical voice, or exist as a destructive force known as the [[Bleeding Phoenix]] that spreads its influence through eggs merged with various living beings.}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Phoenix]] Song is a technique summoned by [[Yerin]] that originates from within her. As the phenomenon reaches a crescendo, it exerts a powerful influence over its targets. This technique is capable of stripping [[Remnants]] of their [[madra]], memories, and even their will.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Phoenix Song]] is a technique [[Yerin]] uses.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] summoned the [[Phoenix Song]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Phoenix Song]] was within [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Phoenix Song]] can strip [[Remnants]] of their will, memories, and [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Phoenix Song]] is a technique or phenomenon that reaches a crescendo.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
